title: rx_thread error backoff masks persistent hardware failures
description: Location: lora_l2.c:182-186. On lora_recv error (not EAGAIN), code sleeps 1s then retries indefinitely. If radio hardware fails permanently, this loops forever at 1Hz without escalating (no counter, no LOG_ERR upgrade, no device disable). In a deployed mesh node, this silently drops all RX without indication. Consider: error counter, escalate log level after N failures, or disable interface after persistent failure.
close_reason: Fixed: added consecutive_errors counter in rx_thread with LOG_WRN after 5 consecutive errors suggesting hardware check
